note: FEATURE LANE: deploy ATLAS GUARDIAN - expected-state, output-based self-healing watchdog (encodes every June-13 failure mode: gridlock, short pools, dead timers, crash-loops, stalled output, stale discovery; auto-fixes safe ones; publishes guardian.json with explicit ISSUES). Plus atlas-watchdog2 timer = watcher-of-watchers reviving guardian+sentinel. PERMANENT reliability fix.

steps.content:
[Unit]
Description=ATLAS Guardian (expected-state, output-based self-healing watchdog)
After=postgresql.service
[Service]
Type=simple
EnvironmentFile=-/etc/atlas/db.env
EnvironmentFile=-/etc/atlas/autopull.env
ExecStart=/opt/atlas/venv/bin/python /opt/atlas/atlas_guardian.py
Restart=always
RestartSec=15
Nice=5
[Install]
WantedBy=multi-user.target

[Unit]
Description=ATLAS watcher-of-watchers (revives guardian + sentinel if down)
[Service]
Type=oneshot
ExecStart=/bin/bash -c 'systemctl is-active --quiet atlas-guardian.service || { systemctl reset-failed atlas-guardian.service; systemctl restart atlas-guardian.service; }; systemctl is-active --quiet atlas-bottleneck-sentinel.service || { systemctl reset-failed atlas-bottleneck-sentinel.service; systemctl restart atlas-bottleneck-sentinel.service; }'

[Unit]
Description=ATLAS watcher-of-watchers timer (5min)
[Timer]
OnBootSec=90
OnUnitInactiveSec=300
Unit=atlas-watchdog2.service
[Install]
WantedBy=timers.target
